name: Continue testing without rebuilding
description: Resume interactive training / dashboard design / approval for an already-persisted agent instead of re-walking wizard steps 1-5.
content_md: When the run state reports a persisted agent slug (slug_verified=true) and the user asks to continue, resume training/dashboard/approval directly via the wizard.continue_testing bridge. Never re-walk wizard steps 1-5.
